arts.ttl: Arsenal's Premier League title chances officially over if Liverpool beat Man City, legend says
arts.sum: Arsenal's hopes of winning the Premier League will be over if Liverpool overcome Manchester City in Sunday's Premier League showdown, Ray Parlour tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: Arsenal could ‘return to charge’ for player – Drama means cut price deal now possible
arts.sum: Arsenal were mentioned as a potential suitor for Atalanta’s Ademola Lookman in the last summer transfer window. There were also indications the Gunners were being used in the saga to attract Paris Saint-Germain’s attention towards the Nigeria international. Lookman’s situation has flared up again over the past few days. arts.ttl: West Ham pushing hard for 29 G/A ace who Man United want
arts.sum: After what can best be described as a below average campaign in 2024/25, West Ham appear to be going all out this summer to land Lille’s brilliant striker, Jonathan David. The Canadian already has 29 goals and assists combined this season (transfermarkt), out of a career total of 183 G/A in 301 games. arts.ttl: I was at Upton Park riot between West Ham and Millwall
arts.sum: West Ham's clash with Millwall in the Carling Cup's second round tie was always going to be heated due to the entrenched history between the clubs, prompting an extensive police turnout around and within the stadium. Amidst the bedlam, West Ham fan Rick Galer experienced a double dose of misfortune, having brought his future girlfriend to what would become an infamous first date.

arts.ttl: West Ham XI vs Arsenal – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: West Ham make the short trip across the capital to face Arsenal in the Premier League this weekend. Graham Potter’s appointment has failed to be the lift needed at the London Stadium, with the Hammers winless in their last four games. arts.ttl: Arsenal and Tottenham intend to table offers for 20-year-old Corinthians player
arts.sum: Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur have Corinthians’ Breno Bidon in their target list for the summer window. That’s according to Bolavip Brasil, and they state Arsenal and Tottenham are interested in signing the 20-year-old. He spent five years at Corinthians’ youth system before being promoted to the first team in 2024.
